prompt: A hand-woven fabric receipt from "Alpaca Dreams Boutique" in Cusco, Peru, showing traditional textiles and wool products in nuevos soles, with Quechua translations and an actual alpaca fiber sample attached
prompt_refined: A hand-woven fabric receipt from "Alpaca Dreams Boutique" in Cusco, Peru. The receipt details traditional textiles and wool products, with prices clearly marked in Peruvian Nuevos Soles (PEN). Product descriptions feature bilingual text, including Quechua translations. A small, fluffy sample of actual alpaca fiber is physically attached to one of the receipt's corners.
objects: Details of traditional textiles on receipt
Details of wool products on receipt
Prices in Peruvian Nuevos Soles (PEN) on receipt
Bilingual product descriptions on receipt (including Quechua)
Alpaca fiber sample attached to one of the receipt's corners
